description: Backward compatibility: pure valid inputs, no sentinels. DSR result must match R5 baseline (sentinel filter is a no-op). Proves R6 does not change behavior for clean trial sets.

dsr_scenario.derivation: autotuner.compute_deflated_sharpe_ratio(SR_obs=1.5, SR_0=1.36773, gamma3=0.44803, gamma4=2.2, T=60). Matches fixture 01 valid_only_moments dsr_valid_only_moments. R6 must not change this value.

derivation.backward_compat_assertion: filter_sortino_sentinels([...valid...]) returns the same list unchanged. Moments computed from filtered == moments computed from original. DSR == R5 baseline DSR.
